'''Meala''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hapan]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] who gave [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana Solo]] a special weapon that had a poison that lasted until the antidote was given.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1stm}}
